summary: Added top-level `lock --robot-triage` backed by the read-only doctor triage report.
Added top-level `lock capabilities --json` with agent surfaces, side effects, and repair-mode metadata.
Added top-level `lock robot-docs guide` and synchronized README, AGENTS.md, and the source-of-truth plan.
Changed `lock doctor --fix` from a generic clap unknown-flag error into an explicit safe refusal with exact read-only alternatives.
